comparison_to_prior_ambiguous_candidates.summary: MASTER_UPPER_SYSTEM review selects a source only if a MASTER-linked gate-like CSV contains old_short/live route rows and frozen-compatible schema without competing MASTER candidates.

limitations: Logger script was parsed as text only and not executed.
Large files were sampled only when below the safe read threshold.
No gate decisions were inferred, rebuilt, or manually overridden.
No reviewed 1h panel substitution was used.
